prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次分别为12620→11501→12388→11525名，整体在11500–12600区间波动，2025年基准约11525名，近两年呈小幅前移趋势；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2022–2025年均为8人，2026年计划缩减至5人，较2025年缩招37.5%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第62名，近年排名稳定在48–62区间，属中上游211；近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音平台曝光度较低，报考关注度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业为新能源科学与工程（能源动力类，社会热度偏热/推荐）和机械类（分化观望）；上海市2026年考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35.4%，竞争压力显著增大；学校位于北京市，在上海招生计划较少（2022–2025年均为8人），属跨省招生，本地生源偏好无显著影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11525名、2026年计划大幅缩招37.5%及上海市考生总数显著增长约35.4%，竞争加剧趋势明确，再叠加考生大增的额外压力，预测最低位次约8732名，区间8232–9232名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 新能源科学与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械类（含机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间8232–9232名以内，建议以新能源科学与工程为主攻方向（一档冲刺），机械类作为稳妥选择（三档保底）；位次明显优于区间下限（<8232名）可重点冲刺新能源专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings from 2022 to 2025 were 12620 → 11501 → 12388 → 11525, fluctuating within the 11500–12600 range. The 2025 baseline is approximately 11525, showing a slight upward trend in recent years. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Shanghai was 8 students from 2022 to 2025, but it will be reduced to 5 students in 2026, a 37.5% decrease compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable range of 48–62 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Exposure on Douyin (TikTok) is low, and application attention is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment majors are New Energy Science and Engineering (Energy and Power category, socially popular/recommended) and Mechanical Category (differentiated, wait-and-see). The total number of examinees in Shanghai in 2026 is approximately 66,700, a 35.4% increase from 49,276 in 2025, significantly increasing competitive pressure. The university is located in Beijing, with a small enrollment plan in Shanghai (8 students from 2022 to 2025), making it an inter-provincial enrollment with no significant local preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11525, the significant 37.5% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the substantial 35.4% increase in the total number of examinees in Shanghai, the trend of intensified competition is clear. With the additional pressure from the surge in examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8732, with a range of 8232–9232.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- New Energy Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Category (including Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8232–9232, it is recommended to focus on New Energy Science and Engineering as the primary target (Tier 1 sprint), with Mechanical Category as a safe choice (Tier 3 fallback). If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8232), you can prioritize sprinting for the New Energy major.
